zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Cromwell於1416年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾諾維爾時，他的父親Sir Robert Cromwell Lord of Carleton26歲，母親Joane Smythe38歲。他於1441年與Margaret Smythe在英國諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1472年1月在英國素瑞普特尼享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Cromwell于1416年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾諾維爾时，他的父亲Sir Robert Cromwell Lord of Carleton26岁，母亲Joane Smythe38岁。他于1441年与Margaret Smythe在英国諾廷加姆爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1472年1月在英国素瑞普特尼享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cromwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so named in Nottinghamshire, from Old English crumb ‘bent, crooked’ + well(a) ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Cromwell was born in 1416, in Norwell, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Sir Robert Cromwell Lord of Carleton, was 26 and his mother, Joane Smythe, was 38. He married Margaret Smythe in 1441, in Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in January 1472, in Putney, Surrey, England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Cromwell est né en 1416, à Norwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Cromwell Lord of Carleton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joane Smythe, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Smythe en 1441, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en janvier 1472, à Putney, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Cromwell 1416 in Norwell, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Cromwell Lord of Carleton 26 und seine Mutter Joane Smythe 38. Er hat 1441 in Nottinghamshire, England Margaret Smythe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb im Januar 1472 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Putney, Surrey, England.

Lui sposato Margaret Smythe nel 1441, nel Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel gennaio 1472, nel Putney, Surrey, England, all'età di 56 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Cromwell(이)가 1416년 영국 노틴그함실르 노웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Cromwell Lord of Carleton(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Joane Smythe(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1441년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 Margaret Smythe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1472년 1월 영국 수리 풋니에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Cromwell nasceu em 1416, em Norwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Cromwell Lord of Carleton, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joane Smythe, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Smythe em 1441, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em janeiro de 1472, em Putney, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Cromwell родился в 1416 г. в местности норвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Cromwell Lord of Carleton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane Smythe, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Smythe в 1441 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер январь 1472 г. в местности путни, сурри, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.
